2604.12622.title: Efficient Semantic Image Communication for Traffic Monitoring at the Edge
2604.12622.paper_summary: Many visual monitoring systems operate under strict communication constraints, where transmitting full-resolution images is impractical and often unnecessary. In such settings, visual data is often used for object presence, spatial relationships, and scene context rather than exact pixel fidelity. This paper presents two semantic image communication pipelines for traffic monitoring, MMSD and SAMR, that reduce transmission cost while preserving meaningful visual information. MMSD (Multi-Modal Semantic Decomposition) targets very high compression together with data confidentiality, since sensitive pixel content is not transmitted. It replaces the original image with compact semantic representations, namely segmentation maps, edge maps, and textual descriptions, and reconstructs the scene at the receiver using a diffusion-based generative model. SAMR (Semantic-Aware Masking Reconstruction) targets higher visual quality while maintaining strong compression. It selectively suppresses non-critical image regions according to semantic importance before standard JPEG encoding and restores the missing content at the receiver through generative inpainting. Both designs follow an asymmetric sender-receiver architecture, where lightweight processing is performed at the edge and computationally intensive reconstruction is offloaded to the server. On a Raspberry Pi~5, the edge-side processing time is about 15s for MMSD and 9s for SAMR. Experimental results show average transmitted-data reductions of 99% for MMSD and 99.1% for SAMR. In addition, MMSD achieves lower payload size than the recent SPIC baseline while preserving strong semantic consistency, whereas SAMR provides a better quality-compression trade-off than standard JPEG and SQ-GAN under comparable operating conditions.
2604.12622.paper_summary_zh: 許多視覺監控系統在嚴格的通信限制下運作，傳輸全解析度圖像既不切實可行也往往不必要。在這種情況下，視覺數據通常用於物體存在、空間關係和場景上下文，而不是精確的像素保真度。本文提出了兩個用於交通監控的語義圖像通信管道，MMSD 和 SAMR，這些管道在保留有意義的視覺信息的同時減少了傳輸成本。MMSD（多模態語義分解）針對非常高的壓縮率以及數據保密性，因為敏感的像素內容不會被傳輸。它用緊湊的語義表示替代原始圖像，即分割圖、邊緣圖和文本描述，並使用基於擴散的生成模型在接收端重建場景。SAMR（語義感知遮罩重建）則在保持強壓縮的同時，針對更高的視覺質量。它根據語義重要性選擇性地抑制非關鍵圖像區域，然後進行標準 JPEG 編碼，並通過生成填充在接收端恢復缺失內容。這兩種設計遵循不對稱的發送者-接收者架構，其中在邊緣進行輕量級處理，而計算密集型重建則卸載到伺服器上。在 Raspberry Pi~5 上，邊緣側的處理時間對於 MMSD 約為 15 秒，對於 SAMR 約為 9 秒。實驗結果顯示，MMSD 的平均傳輸數據減少率為 99%，而 SAMR 為 99.1%。此外，MMSD 在保持強語義一致性的同時，實現了比最近的 SPIC 基線更小的有效載荷大小，而 SAMR 在可比較的操作條件下提供了比標準 JPEG 和 SQ-GAN 更好的質量-壓縮權衡。
2604.12622.author: Damir Assylbek et.al.
2604.12622.authors: Damir Assylbek, Nurmukhammed Aitymbetov, Marko Ristin, Dimitrios Zorbas
